ripplesWalkthrough.title: Ripples Walkthrough
ripplesWalkthrough.intro: Follow the complete Ripples story from the prologue through Episode 9. This walkthrough covers the main path, key story beats, and how each chapter builds on the last.

steps.title: Begin With the Prologue
steps.description: The prologue introduces Jack and Darci and sets up the central mystery. Read through the opening carefully, because early context shapes how later reveals land.

steps.title: Play Episodes in Order
steps.description: Ripples tells one continuous story across Episodes 1 through 9. Each episode picks up where the previous one ended, so playing in release order keeps the plot coherent.

steps.title: Watch Key Decisions
steps.description: Several choices during the story affect later scenes and relationships. Pay attention to decisions that feel significant, because they often branch the route.

steps.title: Plan Multiple Playthroughs
steps.description: Because routes branch based on choices, a second or third playthrough reveals different scenes and endings. Keep notes on which paths you want to explore next.

quickTips: Save before major decisions so you can revisit alternative outcomes.
New episodes continue the same save file, so your choices carry forward.
If a scene feels disconnected, an earlier choice may have led you down a different branch.
Episode 9 is the latest release, and earlier episodes are complete and stable.

ripplesChoices.title: Ripples Choices Guide
ripplesChoices.intro: Ripples uses a branching choice system where decisions shape relationships, unlock scenes, and lock or open routes. This guide explains how choices work and which ones matter most.

cards.name: Branching Decision Paths
cards.description: Many choices split the story into different branches, leading to distinct scenes, character moments, and outcomes later in the episode.

cards.name: Route Locks
cards.description: Some decisions permanently lock you into a specific route. Once locked, certain scenes and endings become available while others close off.

cards.name: Character-Specific Choices
cards.description: Choices directed at a particular character build your relationship with them and can unlock that character's dedicated route content.

cards.name: Consequences Across Episodes
cards.description: Decisions made in earlier episodes carry forward, so a choice in Episode 3 can still affect what happens in Episode 8 or 9.

ripplesCharacters.title: Ripples Characters
ripplesCharacters.intro: Ripples centers on Jack and Darci, with a supporting cast whose relationships shift based on your choices. Each major character opens their own route and scenes.

cards.name: Jack
cards.description: The protagonist of Ripples. Jack's perspective drives the main story, and the player's choices shape how Jack relates to the world and the people around him.

cards.name: Darci
cards.description: A central figure in the story whose arc is closely tied to Jack. Choices involving Darci influence major plot developments and route availability.

cards.name: Supporting Cast
cards.description: Several secondary characters appear across episodes, each with their own personality, role in the sci-fi mystery, and optional route content.

cards.name: Route Entries
cards.description: Each main character offers a dedicated route. Building enough rapport through targeted choices opens their route and its unique scenes and outcomes.

ripplesStory.title: Ripples Story and Lore
ripplesStory.intro: Ripples is a story-rich sci-fi visual novel with branching paths, multiple routes, and a central mystery that unfolds across episodes. This section covers the setting, plot, and worldbuilding.

cards.name: Sci-Fi Setting
cards.description: Ripples takes place in a science-fiction world where mystery, technology, and personal relationships intertwine across its branching narrative.

cards.name: Main Plot Overview
cards.description: The story follows Jack and Darci as they navigate a series of events full of suspense, revelations, and choices that reshape the outcome.

cards.name: Worldbuilding
cards.description: The setting blends everyday life with science-fiction elements, building a layered world that rewards close attention to dialogue and background detail.

cards.name: Themes
cards.description: Recurring themes include choice and consequence, connection, and the ripple effect that small decisions create across the story.

ripplesEpisodes.title: Ripples Episodes
ripplesEpisodes.intro: Ripples is released in episodes, with each new chapter continuing the story. The latest release is Episode 9. This timeline tracks the episode progression.

entries.title: Episode 1
entries.description: The opening episode introduces Jack, Darci, and the central sci-fi mystery that drives the story forward.

entries.title: Episodes 2-5
entries.description: These episodes expand the world, introduce key supporting characters, and begin the branching routes.

entries.title: Episodes 6-8
entries.description: The plot deepens as earlier choices pay off, relationships develop, and the central mystery comes into sharper focus.

entries.title: Episode 9
entries.description: Episode 9 is the newest chapter, released on April 26, 2026, continuing the ongoing story.

ripplesDownload.title: Ripples Download
ripplesDownload.intro: Ripples is officially available on itch.io, with builds for Windows, macOS, Linux, and Android. This guide covers where to download, supported platforms, and what to expect.

cards.name: itch.io Official Store
cards.description: The official Ripples page on itch.io provides the main download for all supported platforms. Always download from the official page to avoid unofficial builds.

cards.name: Supported Platforms
cards.description: Ripples runs on Windows, macOS, Linux, and Android. Each platform has its own build available on the itch.io page.

cards.name: Patreon Updates and Support
cards.description: The creator's Patreon offers a way to support development and follow episode updates alongside the itch.io release.

cards.name: Version and Updates
cards.description: New episodes continue the same story. The itch.io page always lists the latest version, currently Episode 9.

ripplesAndroid.title: Ripples Android Guide
ripplesAndroid.intro: Ripples has an official Android build. This guide answers the most common install and play questions for the Android version.

faqs.question: How do I install Ripples on Android?
faqs.answer: Download the Android build from the official Ripples itch.io page. On your device, allow installation from the source you downloaded from, then open the file to install.

faqs.question: How much storage does Ripples need on Android?
faqs.answer: Plan for the installed game plus the download file. Free up space beforehand if your device is near its storage limit.

faqs.question: Do my saves carry over between episodes on Android?
faqs.answer: Yes. Ripples continues the same story across episodes, so your save file carries your choices forward into the next chapter.

faqs.question: Which Android devices does Ripples support?
faqs.answer: The Android build targets standard devices with a current operating system version. If the build does not install or run, confirm your device meets the requirements on the itch.io page.

faqs.question: What should I do if the Android build will not install?
faqs.answer: Check that install permissions are enabled for your download source, confirm the file downloaded completely, and make sure you have enough free storage.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Ripples

questions.question: What is Ripples?
questions.answer: Ripples is a story-rich sci-fi visual novel by Jestur. It features Jack and Darci, branching choices, multiple routes, and an episodic story that continues across episodes.

questions.question: Where can I download Ripples?
questions.answer: Ripples is officially available on itch.io, with builds for Windows, macOS, Linux, and Android. The creator also shares updates on Patreon.

questions.question: How many episodes does Ripples have?
questions.answer: Ripples is released in episodes. The latest chapter is Episode 9, released on April 26, 2026, and the story continues with future updates.

questions.question: Do choices matter in Ripples?
questions.answer: Yes. Ripples uses a branching choice system. Decisions shape relationships, unlock scenes, and can lock or open specific character routes.

questions.question: Is Ripples available on Android?
questions.answer: Yes. Ripples has an official Android build available on the itch.io page, alongside Windows, macOS, and Linux versions.

questions.question: Who makes Ripples?
questions.answer: Ripples is created by Jestur. The official itch.io page and Patreon are the main channels for downloads and episode updates.
